option.value:
package com.example.altafedeltium.data.model
data class Product( val id: Int, val name: String, val price: Double, val category: String, val imageRes: Int, val description: String = "", val stock: Int = 0 val description: String = "", val stock: Int = 0 )

data class Product( val id: Int, val name: String, val price: Double, val category: String, val imageRes: Int )

originalContent
option.value:
package com.example.altafedeltium.ui.theme
import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Brush import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color import androidx.compose.material3.MaterialTheme import androidx.compose.material3.darkColorScheme import androidx.compose.material3.lightColorScheme import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
private val LightColors = lightColorScheme( primary = Color(0xFFC86421), onPrimary = Color(0xFFFFFFFF), primaryContainer = Color(0xFFFFD7B8), onPrimaryContainer = Color(0xFF4A2200), secondary = Color(0xFF8A5A32), onSecondary = Color(0xFFFFFFFF), secondaryContainer = Color(0xFFFFDEBF), onSecondaryContainer = Color(0xFF321300), tertiary = Color(0xFF7A6838), onTertiary = Color(0xFFFFFFFF), background = Color(0xFFFFF7F0), onBackground = Color(0xFF271A12), surface = Color(0xFFFFFBF7), onSurface = Color(0xFF2A1A12), surfaceVariant = Color(0xFFF9E6D7), onSurfaceVariant = Color(0xFF5D4638), error = Color(0xFFBA1A1A), onError = Color(0xFFFFFFFF) )
private val DarkColors = darkColorScheme( primary = Color(0xFFFFB77F), onPrimary = Color(0xFF4A2200), primaryContainer = Color(0xFF67360F), onPrimaryContainer = Color(0xFFFFDCC3), secondary = Color(0xFFF3BE92), onSecondary = Color(0xFF4B280A), secondaryContainer = Color(0xFF653E1D), onSecondaryContainer = Color(0xFFFFDCC3), tertiary = Color(0xFFE6CD93), onTertiary = Color(0xFF41310A), background = Color(0xFF1B120C), onBackground = Color(0xFFF3DED0), surface = Color(0xFF1F1510), onSurface = Color(0xFFF6E0D2), surfaceVariant = Color(0xFF514337), onSurfaceVariant = Color(0xFFD8C2B2), error = Color(0xFFFFB4AB), onError = Color(0xFF690005) )
val WarmOrangeGradientLight = Brush.verticalGradient( colors = listOf( Color(0xFFFFF6EE), Color(0xFFFFE8D2) ) )
val WarmOrangeGradientDark = Brush.verticalGradient( colors = listOf( Color(0xFF2A1C14), Color(0xFF1D140F) ) )
@Composable fun AltafedeltiumTheme( darkTheme: Boolean = false, content: @Composable () -> Unit ) { MaterialTheme( colorScheme = if (darkTheme) DarkColors else LightColors, content = content ) }
